name: Meat Loaf Bourguignon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Cheddar cheese, cut into 1/8-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the cheese and parsley sprigs, in the order listed.
2. Knead the mixture to ensure it is well combined.
3. Divide the mixture into two equal parts and form each part into a compact loaf about 1 1/2 inches thick.
4. Place one loaf on top of the other and pinch the edges together firmly to seal.
5. Transfer the assembled loaves to a shallow roasting pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 1 hour.
7. Remove from the oven and slice the loaf.
8. Arrange slices on a warm platter and garnish with parsley sprigs.
